turns.text: kripya jaldi paymênt karein
मैंने पिछले हफ्ते भुगतान किया था, फिर भी कॉल क्यों आ रही है?
मैं सिस्टम चेक कर रहा हूं, क्या आप ट्रांजैक्शन की जानकारी साझा कर सकते हैं?
ठीक है, लेकिन पहले किसी सीनियर से बात करवाइए।
Hello sir, aapki EMI due hai aur aaj last date hai.
Haan, mujhe yaad hai. Main office se nikalte hi payment kar dunga.
Great, payment ho jaaye to receipt save kar lijiye.
Sure, main UPI se kar deta hoon.
Our records show an unpaid EMI for your account.
I already paid and I have the receipt. This needs to be reviewed.
I will escalate this to the billing team for verification.
Please do that and update me as soon as possible.
Aapka EMI account overdue hai, payment kab tak possible hoga?

जी, मैं आज शाम तक पेमेंट कर दूंगा।
Thanks, main note kar deta hoon.
Namaste ma'am, aapka installment overdue dikh raha hai.
Abhi main market mein hoon, thodi der baad call kar lo.
Theek hai, kis time pe callback set kar doon?
Kal subah 10 baje kar lena.
Good afternoon, I am calling about your overdue installment.
I am driving right now. Can you call me back later tonight?
Sure, I can arrange a callback. What time works for you?
Please call after 8 PM.
